title: Kaddu Chana Dal with Rice
description: Sweet-savory pumpkin and chana dal served with rice—a seasonal, filling Indian comfort plate.
explanation: Pumpkin gives the dal volume and a naturally mellow flavour while chana dal keeps the plate more substantial than a plain sabzi-and-rice meal.
ingredients: 3/4 cup Chana Dal, soaked 30 minutes if possible
instructions: Cook rice and keep warm. Pressure-cook chana dal until tender but not mushy.
Heat oil, add cumin and tomato, then cook until soft.
Add pumpkin, turmeric, coriander powder, salt, and a splash of water. Cover until pumpkin is tender.
Fold in the cooked dal and simmer 5 minutes so the flavours combine.
Finish with lemon and coriander; serve with rice.
